tags.name: Burpengary
tags.wheelchair:description: Overhead bridge between platforms with no lifts

tags.name: Caboolture
tags.wheelchair:description: Lifts on all three platforms, boarding ramps for wheelchairs

tags.name: Toowong
tags.wheelchair:description: Unisex accessible toilet, no emergency button. Service counter (too high) inaccessible. Ramps to/from carpark inaccessible due to poor handrails. Wheelchair accessible Park’n’Ride carpark (3 parking slots), lift, entrance and path of travel available.

tags.name: Buranda
tags.note: "The station is now closed until 2025 while major work is underway."

tags.name: Beerburrum
tags.wheelchair:description: Ramp access from car park to platform and lifts to travel over to southbound platform

tags.name: Surfers Paradise North
tags.wikipedia: en:Surfers Paradise North light rail station

tags.name: Sunshine Railway Modellers Society.
tags.operator: Sunshine Coast Railway Modellers Society Incorporated

tags.name: Gold Coast University Hospital
tags.wikipedia: en:Gold Coast University Hospital light rail station

tags.name: Domestic Airport station
tags.note:name: This station has many variations on its name. It appears in QR timetables as Domestic Airport

tags.name: Roma Street
tags.note: this is a rare case where the gtfs:* tags are required, because interstate services stop here

tags.name: Woodford
tags.operator: Australian Narrow Gauge Railway Museum Society

tags.name: Milton
tags.wheelchair:description: Ramp access to platform 4. Lift access on all platforms. Attendants in morning and afternoon. Good height for go card and auditory train information.

tags.name: Indooroopilly
tags.wheelchair:description: 2 accessible parks. 1 unisex, wheelchair accessible toilet on Level 1 (accessed via lift). All platforms accessible via lifts. Sufficient space to manoeuvre wheelchair in all necessary areas. Ticketing office on Level 1 with sufficient wheel-under space.

tags.name: International Airport station
tags.note:name: This station has many variations on its name. It appears in QR timetables as International Airport
